name: kimi-protein-design
description: Protein design pipeline: RFdiffusion backbone generation, ProteinMPNN sequence design, AlphaFold3 structure validation
skillInstructions: Prioritize using MCP tools to invoke protein design software. All compute tasks must use submit_job for async execution and query_job for polling. Always call get_tool_info before invoking any tool. Never manually construct command lines when MCP tools are available. For long-running batch validation tasks, use CronCreate to schedule periodic progress checks rather than blocking the session with continuous polling.
